lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Shaz berith an-gor f-

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Shaz berith an-gor fo gah-

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Shaz. Berith. An-

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you hear me?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: What?! What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I just wanted to say hello. I didn't expect to find anyone here.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Well, you found me. I'm here. And I was just in the middle of a very important conversation!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: With who? There's no one else here...

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: With Hagus.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's Hagus?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: I'm Hagus!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Whoa, no need to be rude.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: You just interrupted a very important conversation!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: With who? There's no one else here...

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: With Hagus.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's Hagus?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: I'm Hagus!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Why should I tell you? You could be one of them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: One of them? What are you talking about?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: An abyssal creature, of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Last time I checked I was not an abyssal creature.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Hmph. We'll see about that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So will you tell me where we are?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: This is the Abyss.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I know that. Though I've never been to this part of it before.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Have you heard of the Scar?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well yes, I just came through there-

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Well then you know where we are.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is that thing over there?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: That's Ventriculus.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ventriculus? That thing has a name?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Yes, it's my friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I... I can't tell if you're joking or not.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Ventriculus is an extractor. Feed it and you'll see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Feed it?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Yes. Just put your arm in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That doesn't sound safe.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: It likes the tainted essence you can find in here.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: A pickaxe can help you split off the essence from the amalgamations.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... So I mine tainted essence from amalgamations, then feed it to this Ventriculus.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But why should I do that?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Remember how I said it's an extractor?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Ventriculus will remove excess parts from the essence, chew it up a little, and spit out the rest.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you're saying it refines the essence?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Yes, it can refine it into pure essence. However, it can also give you extracts.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is an 'extract'?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Extracts are powerful, condensed runes. They function as catalysts to make more runes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Make more runes? How exactly does that work?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: If you bring an extract when you runecraft, it multiplies the amount of runes you make.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's neat! I can make so much money from selling these runes!

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Now hold on. I didn't say this was free.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah... I suppose that makes sense.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: I don't care about pure essence. You can extract as much as you want of that.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: But for extracts, you've got to pay up. There's a coffer over there. Leave some money and I'll charge you for the extract you want.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you explain the Ventriculus again?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Ventriculus is an extractor. You can feed it essence from the amalgamations here.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Once fed, it churns away, picking apart the essence, leftover runes and flesh.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: The final product is either pure essence or dense rune extracts.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And how do the extracts work?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Extracts function as catalysts to make more runes.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: If you bring an extract when you runecraft, it multiplies the amount of runes you make.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: However, extracts are valuable. I'll demand some payment for those.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for explaining.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: I'm hanging out with my friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The... Ventriculus? It's really your friend?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: It's helping me search for knowledge on powerful runes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess you could just... not answer my question.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: We heard rumours of a strong one... but the altar was nowhere to be found.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're not really talking to me at all, are you.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Herbert, Finnigan and I... We were all assigned important missions. I must fulfill mine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What mission? Who's Finnigan?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Ah, where were we. Did you feed Ventriculus yet? We need more-

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: I mean. I'm sure you'd like some extracts.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me more about yourself?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: My name is Hagus.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes... So you've said. Where are you from?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: My upbringing is none of your concern.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't mean to pry. I just thought I'd get to know you a little bit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How long have you been in here?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Many years. Years. Time... Yes, time. It's time I showed them. I need to find the rune.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Rune? What rune?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Unless you're a member of the Institute, I cannot share that with you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind. Goodbye.

sections.title: Interacting with the mine before finishing the tutorial
Before talking to him at all

lines.speaker: Stranger
lines.text: What are you doing? I didn't say you could touch that!

sections.title: Before progressing through all his standard dialogue

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Hey, what are you doing? I haven't finished talking to you.

sections.title: Any item before progressing through all his standard dialogue

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Leave me alone. I'm not interested in whatever you have to show me.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: That's the one! Where did you find this?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wrath runes? There are several sources, really. You can-

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: They exist! I knew it!

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Now, tell me, where does it come from? Where's the altar?

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: I must have one. To study it. Can I have it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, here you go.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: It's real! This changes everything!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Happy to help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I think I'll keep it myself.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Hand it over! I need it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No means no.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Grrr! Fine. But I urge you to reconsider.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Another wrath rune! Can I have it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure. Here you go.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Another one! Haha! The others won't believe this!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're welcome.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Yes! More. More wrath runes for my collection. Can I have it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure. Here you go.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: My spells will be so powerful now!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're welcome.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Another wrath rune? For me? Don't mind if I do!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure. Here you go.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: And they said it couldn't be done. That there was no such thing!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're welcome.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: The power of these runes... It's drawing me in... And I love it! May I have it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure. Here you go.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Go fetch more!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're welcome.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: For me? You shouldn't have.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure. Here you go.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Unlimited power!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're welcome.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: You know what? I don't need more wrath runes... Ah who am I kidding.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure. Here you go.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: There's never enough wrath runes!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're welcome.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: I can't hold more wrath runes.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: I must thank you, friend. You've been a strong supporter of the cause.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: I can now return and take my rightful place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Happy to help! I think...

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: Shaz- Oh, what's this? Ah, yes. A powerful rune indeed.

lines.speaker: Hagus
lines.text: I'm not sure what you want me to do with that.
